Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Springboks players family member in line for Olympics gold

Imagine one family member having a Springboks Rugby World Cup medal and an Olympics gold. Can you guess the Springboks rugby player and Olympic athlete?

Success, speed, drive and determination runs in the blood of this family with a world class Springbok and Olympic athlete having secured golds already.

Wayde van Niekerk famously won gold in the 2016 Olympics in Rio, Brazil.

Meanwhile, his cousin, Cheslin Kolbe has added two Rugby World Cup gold medals with theSpringboksto the family tree.

Springboks speedster Cheslin Kolbe is one of the quickest players in SA Rugby.

Furthermore, he is one of the fastest players in World Rugby. Therefore, it is clear that speed runs in the family (pun-intended).

As mentioned, van Niekerk famously won Gold in 2016 when he won the 400m. However, he will not be competing in this year’s 400m race as he is solely focused on the 200m race.

Additionally, he could represent South Africa in the x100m relay.

In fact, he is now listed to only compete in the men’s 200m,Olympics.comconfirmed.

Meanwhile, he is one of the men who could run the 4x100m relay forTeam SA.

“Van Niekerk is also listed in the pool of runners available for selection to the men’s relay teams. South Africa qualified to the 4x100m and the 4x400m, where the country is considered a top medal contender after their silver at the 2024 World Relays,”the same publication added.
